verses.text: Midangte tawh a kipawlthei phalote amah bek thupi a kisate hi a, midangte' cih khempeuh man a sak khat beek omlo hi
Mihaite in thu a teltheih zawhna ding uh kinlo uh a, pil si, a kicih theihna ding deihna bek tawh thu gen uh hi
Mawhna bawl leeng maizumna tawh kizom pah a, minsiatna ngah leeng mindaina tawh kizom pah hi
Mihingte' kampau pen pilna kipatna suak thei a, tuipi bangin thuk-in luitui bangin a siang hi
Mimawhte angvanin diksak a, midikte mawhsak ding thumanlo hi
Mihaite in kitotna ding a pat ciangin hong sat un, ci-in a ngenngen ahi hi
Mihaite a pau ciangin amau' siatna ding mah a pau hi a, amau' kampau mah awkpih uh hi
Gensiatna pen anlim mahmah tawh kibang a, thakhatin i sungah kihupsuk hi
Na a susia mite a hoihloh zah mahin a thadahte zong mihoihlo ahi hi
Topa' min pen tausang muan'huai tawh kibang a, thuman mite in belin lungmuangin om thei uh hi
Khuapi kiima kulhpi in amah a hut bangin a hauhna in amah a hu dingin mihaupa in ngaihsunkha hi
A kiniamkhiatte in zahtakna ngah uh a, a kihisakte pen siat ding a manawh hita hi
A thu za khin nailopi-in dawn'kikna pen haina leh maizumna ahi hi
Mihingte' lungsim in cinatna thuakzo sak a, mihing lungsim kisia leh cihna ding om nawnlo hi
Thungaihsun theite in a pilna uh behlap a, pilna a ngahna dingun mipilte in a bil uh tawh limtakin ngai uh hi
Letsong in a piapa-a' dingin lampi hon'sak a, miliante tawh kimusak thei hi
Thukhenna zumah a langpa in a thuk mateng a gen masapa a thuman tawh kibang hi
Thugen a siam tuak mi nih zum sungah a kiseel ciangin kiciamna bek in thu khenzo hi
Sanggamte na huhna in khuapi muan'huai bangin hong hu a, sanggam tawh kitotna in kidonlohna piangsak hi
Mi khat in a kampauna hangin gilvahna ngah ding a, a thugenna hangin nuntakna ngah ding hi
Kampauna in sihna ahi a, hin'na ahi zongin piangsak thei a, i kampauna bangin a piangte san'loh phamawh hi
Zi a muzote na hoih a mu hi a, Topa' maipha a ngah ahi hi
Mizawngte a pau ciangin thumna kam zang a, mihaute in a dawn' ciangin kihihsakna kam zang hi
Lawm pawlkhatte sauvei kimanglo a, lawm pawlkhatte sanggam sangin kipzaw hi.
